title: Fighting Elegy
writer: Mitsutoshi Ishigami, Kaneto Shindô, Takashi Suzuki
actors: Hideki Takahashi, Junko Asano, Yûsuke Kawazu
plot: During the 1930s, a teenager yearns for a Catholic girl, whose only desire is to reform his sinful tendencies. Hormones raging, the young man channels his unsatisfied lust into the only outlet available: savage, crazed violence.
